Function reference

Calendars

calendar()
Calendar
calendar_label() calendar_name() calendar_unit() calendar_epoch() calendar_fixed() calendar_direction()
Calendar Parameters
convert()
Calendar Converter
BP() b2k() BC() BCE() AD() CE()
Gregorian Calendar
is_gregorian() is_julian()
Is an Object a Calendar?
J()
Julian Calendar

Rata Die

Arith(<RataDie>,<RataDie>) Arith(<numeric>,<RataDie>) Arith(<RataDie>,<numeric>)
Arithmetic Operators
as_date()
Date Conversion from Rata Die
as_decimal()
Converts a Date to a Decimal of its Year
as_fixed()
Coerce to Rata Die
as_year()
Year Conversion from Rata Die
fixed()
Rata Die (Fixed Date)
fixed_from_BP() fixed_to_BP() fixed_from_BC() fixed_to_BC() fixed_from_BCE() fixed_to_BCE() fixed_from_AD() fixed_to_AD() fixed_from_CE() fixed_to_CE() fixed_from_b2k() fixed_to_b2k()
Rata Die Conversion to and from Gregorian Years
fixed_from_julian() fixed_to_julian()
Rata Die Conversion to and from Julian Years
format(<TimeScale>) format(<RataDie>)
Date Conversion to Character
pretty(<RataDie>)
Pretty Breakpoints

Time Series

as.data.frame(<TimeSeries>)
Coerce to a Data Frame
series()
Create Time Series
span()
Duration of Time Series
start(<TimeSeries>) end(<TimeSeries>)
Terminal Times of Time Series
time(<TimeSeries>) frequency(<TimeSeries>)
Sampling Times of Time Series
window(<TimeSeries>)
Time Series Windows

Plotting Tools

image(<TimeSeries>)
Heat Map
plot(<TimeSeries>,<missing>)
Plot Time Series
year_axis()
Time Series Plotting Functions

Mutators

`[`(<RataDie>,<ANY>,<ANY>,<ANY>) `[`(<TimeSeries>,<ANY>,<ANY>,<ANY>)
Extract or Replace Parts of an Object

Classes

RataDie-class .RataDie
RataDie
TimeScale-class .TimeScale
TimeScale
TimeSeries-class .TimeSeries
TimeSeries

Datasets

dates
Sample Data from Reingold and Dershowitz (2018)

On this page

aion is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau, Joe Roe.

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.7.
